verdict.summary: The round-1 major finding is resolved. The workflows now carry the producing job's GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT alongside the outcome and construct the idempotency run_id from that preserved output: retrying only the recorder reuses the same key, while re-running the producing job receives a fresh attempt and remains countable. Dispatch records in the producing job and already has the same property. The self-test is non-vacuous: it separately asserts same-producing-attempt deduplication and same-GITHUB_RUN_ID/fresh-producing-attempt append behavior, including the resulting consecutive-failure count. The bounded full-jitter CAS retry tests also exercise placement and exact RNG bounds. No new correctness, fail-closed, security, or test-validity issue is evident in the diff.
